title: selaginella caluffii
intro: Selaginella caluffii is a species of spore-bearing vascular plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as resurrection fern due to its ability to recover from desiccation. The medicinal properties of Selaginella caluffii have been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Latin America, to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Selaginella caluffii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems.
